bugs.title: AirPods Switch to the Wrong Device
bugs.description: You're listening to music on your Mac. Your iPhone buzzes with a notification. Your AirPods instantly switch to your iPhone. No audio was playing on the iPhone. You didn't ask for this. Now you have to manually switch back. Every. Single. Time.

calculation.notes: Based on ~150M AirPods users, 40% using multiple Apple devices, happening ~3x daily

bugs.title: Volume HUD Blocks the Screen
bugs.description: You're watching a video. You adjust the volume. A giant volume indicator appears RIGHT IN THE CENTER OF YOUR SCREEN, blocking what you're watching. This was a problem in iOS 1. It's still a problem. They finally fixed it in iOS 13... but only in some apps.

calculation.notes: 1B iPhone users, 70% adjust volume while watching video, 5x daily, 2 seconds of blocked content each time. Partially fixed in iOS 13 but still affects many apps.

bugs.title: Siri Randomly Activates
bugs.description: You're in a meeting. Your pocket says 'Sorry, I didn't catch that.' You didn't say 'Hey Siri.' Nobody said anything remotely close to 'Hey Siri.' Siri just felt like joining the conversation.

calculation.notes: 500M Siri-enabled devices, 15% experience random activations, happens about once every 5 days, 10 seconds to dismiss and recover

bugs.title: Autocorrect: 'Its' to 'It's' (Wrongly)
bugs.description: You type 'its' (possessive). Autocorrect changes it to 'it's' (contraction). You meant 'its'. You change it back. It changes it again. You add 'its' to your dictionary. It still changes it. This has been happening for 15+ years.

calculation.notes: Affects virtually all English-typing iPhone users, happens multiple times daily, requires manual correction

bugs.title: Mail App Won't Refresh
bugs.description: You pull to refresh in Mail. The spinner spins. And spins. Your email from 3 hours ago is still showing as 'latest.' You close the app. Open it again. Pull to refresh. Still nothing. You know you have new emails because you checked on the web.

calculation.notes: 300M Mail app users, 25% experience refresh issues regularly, once daily, 30 seconds to close/reopen/retry

bugs.title: The Phantom Notification Badge
bugs.description: There's a red badge on your Settings app. You open Settings. You scroll through every menu. There's nothing new. The badge remains. You go into every submenu. Still nothing. The badge mocks you. It will never go away.

calculation.notes: Extremely common bug, users spend significant time hunting for the source of phantom badges

bugs.title: WiFi Prefers Bad Network Over Good One
bugs.description: You have two WiFi networks: your fast home network and the terrible guest network. Your Mac connects to the guest network. Every time. You've set priority. You've removed the guest network. It reconnects anyway. Your Mac hates you.

calculation.notes: 100M Mac users, 35% have multiple networks, happens twice daily on average

bugs.title: Time Machine: 'Preparing Backup' Forever
bugs.description: You click 'Back Up Now.' Status: 'Preparing backup...' You wait. 'Preparing backup...' You go make coffee. 'Preparing backup...' You come back tomorrow. 'Preparing backup...' Your Mac has been 'preparing' for 18 hours.

calculation.notes: 50M Time Machine users, 20% experience the eternal preparing state, typically requires restart to fix
